case_title: SANDOVAL, SANDRA M et al VS GRAFF, JOSEPH et al

NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT ALL ANIMALS EMERGENCY HOSPITAL, INC.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SANDOVAL, SANDRA M PEDROIA, NICOLE M AS TO DEFENDANT GRAFF, JOSEPH ALL ANIMALS EMERGENCY HOSPITAL, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-28-2000 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
